mapper.sql: c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.description, c.sort_order, c.visible, COUNT(a.id) AS article_count, c.created_at, c.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM category c LEFT JOIN article a ON a.category_id = c.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.sort_order, c.name
SELECT FROM category c LEFT JOIN article a ON a.category_id = c.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.id = #{id} GROUP BY c.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, slug, description, sort_order, visible) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{visible})
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET name = #{name}, slug = #{slug}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, visible = #{visible} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.sql: t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.description, t.sort_order, t.visible, COUNT(a.id) AS article_count, t.created_at, t.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tag t LEFT JOIN article_tag at ON at.tag_id = t.id LEFT JOIN article a ON a.id = at.article_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.sort_order, t.name
SELECT FROM tag t LEFT JOIN article_tag at ON at.tag_id = t.id LEFT JOIN article a ON a.id = at.article_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE t.id = #{id} GROUP BY t.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tag (name, slug, description, sort_order, visible) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{visible})
mapper.update: UPDATE tag SET name = #{name}, slug = #{slug}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, visible = #{visible} WHERE id = #{id}
